title: UI adjustment: In a conversation, I’d like to be able to re-run an answer with a different model, to see if this brings a better answer from the AI. Like a retry. I would like to still have access to all versions of the answer.
description:
I added the "Retry" button to the `MarkdownMessage` component. This button allows users to retry with a different model and view different versions of the AI responses within the same conversation.

### Key Changes:
- **Retry Button**: A button is added to each message to retry with a different model.
- **Version Management**: State management to track and display all answer versions.

You can integrate this functionality with your backend to select different models and fetch new responses.
